title: RatioLemmas
summary: Proves ratios of neighboring closed coefficients needed to discharge the recurrence equations.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Proves ratios of neighboring closed coefficients needed to discharge the recurrence equations.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/RatioLemmas.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ORFirst Slot Multiplier. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ORFirstSlotMultiplier {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ORSecond Slot Multiplier. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ORSecondSlotMultiplier {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ORFirst Slot Left Factor. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ORFirstSlotLeftFactor {N : ℕ} (n w₁ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ORSecond Slot Left Factor. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ORSecondSlotLeftFactor {N : ℕ} (n w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORRegular A move a to b expanded. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_move_a_to_b_expanded {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORRegularA n w₁ w₂ (I.move_a_to_b ha) = pochhammerQ (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂) ((I.b + 1) + I.c)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORRegular A move a to c expanded. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_move_a_to_c_expanded {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORRegularA n w₁ w₂ (I.move_a_to_c ha) = pochhammerQ (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂) (I.b + (I.c + 1))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ORRegular AFirst Recurrence. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularAFirstRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ORRegular ASecond Recurrence. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularASecondRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORFirst Slot Left Factor eq two beta last. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORFirstSlotLeftFactor_eq_two_beta_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORFirstSlotLeftFactor n w₁ I = 2 * (ORBeta N n w₁ + ((N - (I.b + 1) : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORSecond Slot Left Factor eq two gamma last. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORSecondSlotLeftFactor_eq_two_gamma_last {N : ℕ} (n w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORSecondSlotLeftFactor n w₂ I = 2 * (ORGamma N n w₂ + ((N - (I.c + 1) : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: neg ORSlot Multiplier eq two alpha last. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem neg_ORSlotMultiplier_eq_two_alpha_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : -ORFirstSlotMultiplier n w₁ w₂ I = 2 * (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + ((I.b + I.c : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: neg ORSecond Slot Multiplier eq two alpha last. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem neg_ORSecondSlotMultiplier_eq_two_alpha_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : -ORSecondSlotMultiplier n w₁ w₂ I = 2 * (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + ((I.b + I.c : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORRegular A first Recurrence. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_firstRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORRegular A second Recurrence. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_secondRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ORRegular A satisfies Lemma31 Recurrences. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_satisfiesLemma31Recurrences {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I) ∧ (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I)

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
